summary: Solid canvas Go board with stones correctly placed on intersections and visible hoshi dots, good controls and turn alternation, but capture counter never increments and move counter stays at 0 throughout all scenarios.
evidence_highlights: Stone centering probe shows placed stone brightness 40 at intersection vs 170 at midpoints, confirming stones render on intersections not cell centers
P44 (center hoshi) shows brightness 44 vs 145 reference (delta 101) on empty board, confirming hoshi dots are drawn
Occupied-point rejection confirmed: second click on P00 produces 0 changed pixels and status stays unchanged
Turn alternation verified across all scenarios: status correctly flips between 'Black to play' and 'White to play'
evidence_gaps: Capture counter never increments from 0 in any scenario, including the dedicated capture sequence — no capture evidence
Move counter remains at 'Move 0' throughout all scenarios, suggesting move tracking is non-functional or display is broken
Suicide rejection at P00 shows only 112 changed pixels with ambiguous pixel color (brightness 180), not conclusive
